name: pr_ub_order_k6
drl:
rule "Grow"
when
    T($n : n, n < 6)
then
    insertLogical(new T($n + 1));
end
rule "Obs4"
when
    P(tag == "e1")
    not T(n == 4)
then
    insert(new Mark(4));
end
rule "Obs1"
when
    P(tag == "e1")
    not T(n == 1)
then
    insert(new Mark(1));
end
rule "Obs6"
when
    P(tag == "e1")
    not T(n == 6)
then
    insert(new Mark(6));
end
rule "Obs3"
when
    P(tag == "e1")
    not T(n == 3)
then
    insert(new Mark(3));
end
rule "Obs2"
when
    P(tag == "e1")
    not T(n == 2)
then
    insert(new Mark(2));
end
rule "Obs5"
when
    P(tag == "e1")
    not T(n == 5)
then
    insert(new Mark(5));
end
